channel.title: Machine Learning on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: The Inevitability of (Missing) Deadlines
item.description: Friday night is date night. I should not promise to show my work when a date with my wife is on the line. While that post is still on the horizon, I also wanted to share more about my ongoing education in R and statistics. Specifically, that I purchased and have begun reading An Introduction to Statistical Learning. I have the e-book version. Like reading Watchmen for the first time, my plan is to read a chapter a night and do those excercises in the day.

item.title: Setting the Bar for 2018
item.description: This new blog has a single purpose: To document my attempt to deploy a neural network in order to ethically address at least one issue faced by juvenile justice professionals and justice involved youth by December 2018. My name is Marty, and I have been a Cook County Juvenile Probation Officer for over seventeen years 1. Being an officer is not just a job for me. It is a vocation, a calling.
